title: Eating Animations x Better Vanilla'Foods
description: Add compatibility between Eating Animations and the food of the resource pack "Better Vanilla'Foods"
body: **Bundle Texture Pack Compat** [**Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility (FORGE/FABRIC)**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-more-mod-compatibility) ### Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility **Add compatibility for mods with [Eating animation(FORGE/FABRIC)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)** ### Mod Compatibility & Fixes: - [**Better Vanilla'Foods**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-vanilla-foods) ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1655868948a8ec50a48d640c8fd54217ef4b462.png)
